TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: qalang_tranan_福山部落
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == cyux te inu qu qalang 部落概況與位置 == qalang na tranan ga,kki'an na squliq Tayal,smsun squ gaga ru pincbaqan na qnxan Tayal,ini iyal wahiy pcyaqih na pmrruw zyuwaw kbalyun ,nanu qu rhizyal qyunam,inkyasan hlahuy ga mtasaw kinbalay betunux ,giwal nqu qqalang betunux minnanak iyat hmtan pkton na rhzyal.yasa qu tepucig min'zyu be thaqan na qalanq,maki sa yatux balau qu dong mstranan,maki hazi 106.3188 mpayat hkuy kore kinslabang nya ru 600 meta kinwag. sinllwan lalu qalang 地名由來 Pinqzwan nqu mrhuw ta Yawi.Puna' ga,kahl kinhulan lkotas ta pinsbkan, ru magan squ kinqoyat biniq na Lkbuta lru rasun nya kwara cingasal nya si pkrayas squ hlahuy ,mintehuk squ qalang mstranan qani ,qsu'un nya psurux qalang beh gong cyaqung qasa, yasa qu qsu balay maki qalang beh yatux na llyung mstranan la,,baqaw ta kawas 1730 hazi mwah min'izyu sqani.suruw ryax nasa ga, ktan nha talagay pizyux qqulih Tayal si qopu' mutu' babaw na qsya llyung ru cingay bal qsinuw nyux mhmut mlata' mqyanux beh syaw gong ru rrgyax,pqasun balay inlungan nya mrhu Yawi.Puna' ini naga kzinga nya musa kmayal mrhu krahu kinholan nqu Lkbuta,pqutan nya Yawi.Puna' qenu qasa ? nanu lalu na? si knguray mnglung kma qu Yawi.Puna' mha: trang ryax nasa ga …..trang …ini nya baqi lalu nya ,iyat nya pnongan ana qutux uzi, nanu yasa si piray hmali nya mrhu Lkbuta' mha: mstranan ,twangan nya an suruw trang lga lalu na Tayal" tranan " mha la,ana musa qalang inu qalang Tayal ga ,pqzyu' squ qalang mtranan ga misuw bal llungun nha rhzyal na hbuyaw qquliq Tayal ru qsinuw nhyun nqu mblaq qqoyat na qalang ,mwah squ tlelu mlahang lga "xusan song"son nha la, ana betaq soni qu lalu na qalang la. pinqzyuwan qalang 部落遷徙 qalang mstranan ga n_gyut hbuyaw squliq mqyanux lga,musa mgayangpsgagay hkangi giqas na qyunam,cyugan kbhul kawas wayal ga kahul sa qalang na Takasan Toyengmkrayas bbu' na lupi mbziq mhkangi kakay tehuk sqaniru kbalay qalanq kki'an,ini bsyaq qu phbuyaw squliq na qalang ru rasun nya pqasuw llaqi na musa pkbalay nanaq qu qqalang kki'an nhamaki zmagan qu llaqi nya Yawi.Puna' mtasaw balay inlungan nharu smsun balay kinbaqan nqu lkotas kwara nha.tun nya llaqi si lgluwllyung mstrnana mbziq musa hkzngi 'san nha qalalang nanaq,yasaqu qsuyan laqi maray ga sbilun qalang kwara cingasal nya,te sazinglaqi Tana gaptqalang beh Rahaw;te cyugan laqi Iban ga pyqalang squ Ulay;te mpayat laqi ga mus ptqalang kraga;te zmzgan laqi ga ptqalang nqu Kayu'(Tampya),squliq na Tayal qani ga,si tryax mgluw llyung mstranan mbziq musa mlata tqulih ru qmalup,netaq qu gong talah ru mbiq squ llyung mintehuh rhzyal na bnka' ru bsilung na benux lupi'mblaq balay mqyanux s\\qsahuy na qyunam bniq ni lkotas,kyopan ta na kmukan minkahul cinbwanan na thelulga ,si ta ryax mciraq pqqun rhzyal qnxun,ana gipun mwah klahng ita Taywan na ga sir u pciriq pkkyut krryax,nanu I kblayun nya qiway qqhoniq qu qes na Tayal ki kmukan lru yasa ini pciruq pkkut la,maki b'nux naqnahan Tayal qu ksu' (Pyasan.Maray)qu tayal,nanu I syan nha muci Tayal na ubuy Ksyu' lpi. tayal ka nyux qalang Piyaway misuw qaniy 人口概況 Ryax nasa ga musa hazi maki kbhul zmiman squliq na kya,baha hmswa maki qwang iyal nqu qalang sa ru ini nbah phtuw qalang,si muku mqumah ru mlata hlahuy qnxan nha kwara squliq qalang,baqaw ta aring kawas minkoku 70 ga,qalanq kyahu ga,t'aring prmuruw zyuwaw na lmosay hlahuy,phluzyun nha cingay be squliq hogan mwah qalang rgyax,gyahan nha blihul qalang mwah mkal ru mangay mblaq na ktal betunux na qqsya' ki hlahuy la,squliq na kmkukan lga cingay uzi mwah pbaziy ru 'myuw qeqaya' na Tayal,kruma kmukan lga n_gyut mwah tmwang maki sqani uzi la. snhyan 部落宗教 Kirsto Kyokay ru Tensukyo qqyanux 經濟與特產 qalang Tranan ga maki nyux msyobay na wahan gmzuy tbasaw na okyak;wahan maniq blaq na nniqun hlahuy wahan mhngaw m'abi, ru wahan mqbaq gaga tayal ka cinringan mze'a nqu lubuw tminun cinrngan.mqumah na rramat nniqun lpyung hogan, pbaziy pinbahu hiya ga ungat iyu' na szyon mwah mani okyak ,ana ga knalay nha nniqun nya hekil ru qwaw trakis ru tqenuw tnahuk nha ali'rima ki ayanq ga s'utux nha baly maniq , spiyang na smya' mwah mbaziy lpyung hogan la. tuqiy 部落交通 mzyup ta qalang Ulay ru hnasun ta tuqi usa mpiray hlahuy ru si lgluw musa qalang Rahaw mrkyas qmzit turuy musa ru baqaw ta 12 kore hazi stwahiq lga ptehuk qalang mtranana la. wahan tbasaw mzwi 部落觀光 Te qutux: koyeng kperay,maki sqi yatux na gong mtranan cingay pphpah syaw tuqi ru mtasaw qsya' gong, tehuk ryax 'bagan lga ,khmay be okyak mwah n'os tmnga, lmosay sqani. Te sazing: hkngyan tuqi usa qalang giran Lompya ru usa toying, qalang na balung,mtmalam lhbaw qsilq na mkal tuqi hkngyan ,tuqi na p'agan squliq sraral. Te cyugan:ska na tlingay qalang ga cyux pira i mniqan ru wahan mhngaw m'abi'hngawan,ru psluy pbiran qqaya'hlahuy. Te mpayat:yatux na qalang cyux kya macyapaw ki syawme pqniqan ru p'byal wahan mhngaw lmosay,maki balay lhbaw mhhwah usuw qsliq inlungan squliq ki! == 部落文健站 ==
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨjux te inu qu qalaŋ ******* == qalaŋ na tranan ɣa,kkiʔan na s~ɕquliq tajal,s~ɕms~ɕun s~ɕqu ɣaɣa ru pinʦ~ʨβaqan na qnxan tajal,ini ijal waħij pʦ~ʨjaqiħ na pmrruw zjuwaw kβaljun ,nanu qu rħizjal qjunam,inkjas~ɕan ħlaħuj ɣa mtas~ɕaw kinβalaj βetunux ,ɣiwal nqu qqalaŋ βetunux minnanak ijat ħmtan pkton na rħzjal.jas~ɕa qu tepuʦ~ʨiɣ minʔzju βe tħaqan na qalanq,maki s~ɕa jatux βalau qu *oŋ ms~ɕtranan,maki ħazi ***.**** mpajat ħkuj kore kins~ɕlaβaŋ nja ru *** meta kinwaɣ. s~ɕinllwan lalu qalaŋ **** pinqzwan nqu mrħuw ta jawi.punaʔ ɣa,kaħl kinħulan lkotas~ɕ ta pins~ɕβkan, ru maɣan s~ɕqu kinqojat βiniq na lkβuta lru ras~ɕun nja kwara ʦ~ʨiŋas~ɕal nja s~ɕi pkrajas~ɕ s~ɕqu ħlaħuj ,minteħuk s~ɕqu qalaŋ ms~ɕtranan qani ,qs~ɕuʔun nja ps~ɕurux qalaŋ βeħ ɣoŋ ʦ~ʨjaquŋ qas~ɕa, jas~ɕa qu qs~ɕu βalaj maki qalaŋ βeħ jatux na lljuŋ ms~ɕtranan la,,βaqaw ta kawas~ɕ **** ħazi mwaħ minʔizju s~ɕqani.s~ɕuruw rjax nas~ɕa ɣa, ktan nħa talaɣaj pizjux qquliħ tajal s~ɕi qopuʔ mutuʔ βaβaw na qs~ɕja lljuŋ ru ʦ~ʨiŋaj βal qs~ɕinuw njux mħmut mlataʔ mqjanux βeħ s~ɕjaw ɣoŋ ru rrɣjax,pqas~ɕun βalaj inluŋan nja mrħu jawi.punaʔ ini naɣa kziŋa nja mus~ɕa kmajal mrħu kraħu kinħolan nqu lkβuta,pqutan nja jawi.punaʔ qenu qas~ɕa ? nanu lalu na? s~ɕi kŋuraj mŋluŋ kma qu jawi.punaʔ mħa: traŋ rjax nas~ɕa ɣa *..traŋ *ini nja βaqi lalu nja ,ijat nja pnoŋan ana qutux uzi, nanu jas~ɕa s~ɕi piraj ħmali nja mrħu lkβutaʔ mħa: ms~ɕtranan ,twaŋan nja an s~ɕuruw traŋ lɣa lalu na tajal" tranan " mħa la,ana mus~ɕa qalaŋ inu qalaŋ tajal ɣa ,pqzjuʔ s~ɕqu qalaŋ mtranan ɣa mis~ɕuw βal lluŋun nħa rħzjal na ħβujaw qquliq tajal ru qs~ɕinuw nħjun nqu mβlaq qqojat na qalaŋ ,mwaħ s~ɕqu tlelu mlaħaŋ lɣa "xus~ɕan s~ɕoŋ"s~ɕon nħa la, ana βetaq s~ɕoni qu lalu na qalaŋ la. pinqzjuwan qalaŋ **** qalaŋ ms~ɕtranan ɣa nɣjut ħβujaw s~ɕquliq mqjanux lɣa,mus~ɕa mɣajaŋps~ɕɣaɣaj ħkaŋi ɣiqas~ɕ na qjunam,ʦ~ʨjuɣan kβħul kawas~ɕ wajal ɣa kaħul s~ɕa qalaŋ na takas~ɕan tojeŋmkrajas~ɕ ββuʔ na lupi mβziq mħkaŋi kakaj teħuk s~ɕqaniru kβalaj qalanq kkiʔan,ini βs~ɕjaq qu pħβujaw s~ɕquliq na qalaŋ ru ras~ɕun nja pqas~ɕuw llaqi na mus~ɕa pkβalaj nanaq qu qqalaŋ kkiʔan nħamaki zmaɣan qu llaqi nja jawi.punaʔ mtas~ɕaw βalaj inluŋan nħaru s~ɕms~ɕun βalaj kinβaqan nqu lkotas~ɕ kwara nħa.tun nja llaqi s~ɕi lɣluwlljuŋ ms~ɕtrnana mβziq mus~ɕa ħkzŋi ʔs~ɕan nħa qalalaŋ nanaq,jas~ɕaqu qs~ɕujan laqi maraj ɣa s~ɕβilun qalaŋ kwara ʦ~ʨiŋas~ɕal nja,te s~ɕaziŋlaqi tana ɣaptqalaŋ βeħ raħaw;te ʦ~ʨjuɣan laqi iβan ɣa pjqalaŋ s~ɕqu ulaj;te mpajat laqi ɣa mus~ɕ ptqalaŋ kraɣa;te zmzɣan laqi ɣa ptqalaŋ nqu kajuʔ(tampja),s~ɕquliq na tajal qani ɣa,s~ɕi trjax mɣluw lljuŋ ms~ɕtranan mβziq mus~ɕa mlata tquliħ ru qmalup,netaq qu ɣoŋ talaħ ru mβiq s~ɕqu lljuŋ minteħuħ rħzjal na βnkaʔ ru βs~ɕiluŋ na βenux lupiʔmβlaq βalaj mqjanux s~ɕ\\qs~ɕaħuj na qjunam βniq ni lkotas~ɕ,kjopan ta na kmukan minkaħul ʦ~ʨinβwanan na tħelulɣa ,s~ɕi ta rjax mʦ~ʨiraq pqqun rħzjal qnxun,ana ɣipun mwaħ klaħŋ ita tajwan na ɣa s~ɕir u pʦ~ʨiriq pkkjut krrjax,nanu i kβlajun nja qiwaj qqħoniq qu qes~ɕ na tajal ki kmukan lru jas~ɕa ini pʦ~ʨiruq pkkut la,maki βʔnux naqnaħan tajal qu ks~ɕuʔ (pjas~ɕan.maraj)qu tajal,nanu i s~ɕjan nħa muʦ~ʨi tajal na uβuj ks~ɕjuʔ lpi. tajal ka njux qalaŋ pijawaj mis~ɕuw qanij **** rjax nas~ɕa ɣa mus~ɕa ħazi maki kβħul zmiman s~ɕquliq na kja,βaħa ħms~ɕwa maki qwaŋ ijal nqu qalaŋ s~ɕa ru ini nβaħ pħtuw qalaŋ,s~ɕi muku mqumaħ ru mlata ħlaħuj qnxan nħa kwara s~ɕquliq qalaŋ,βaqaw ta ariŋ kawas~ɕ minkoku ** ɣa,qalanq kjaħu ɣa,tʔariŋ prmuruw zjuwaw na lmos~ɕaj ħlaħuj,pħluzjun nħa ʦ~ʨiŋaj βe s~ɕquliq ħoɣan mwaħ qalaŋ rɣjax,ɣjaħan nħa βliħul qalaŋ mwaħ mkal ru maŋaj mβlaq na ktal βetunux na qqs~ɕjaʔ ki ħlaħuj la,s~ɕquliq na kmkukan lɣa ʦ~ʨiŋaj uzi mwaħ pβazij ru ʔmjuw qeqajaʔ na tajal,kruma kmukan lɣa nɣjut mwaħ tmwaŋ maki s~ɕqani uzi la. s~ɕnħjan **** kirs~ɕto kjokaj ru tens~ɕukjo qqjanux ***** qalaŋ tranan ɣa maki njux ms~ɕjoβaj na waħan ɣmzuj tβas~ɕaw na okjak;waħan maniq βlaq na nniqun ħlaħuj waħan mħŋaw mʔaβi, ru waħan mqβaq ɣaɣa tajal ka ʦ~ʨinriŋan mzeʔa nqu luβuw tminun ʦ~ʨinrŋan.mqumaħ na rramat nniqun lpjuŋ ħoɣan, pβazij pinβaħu ħija ɣa uŋat ijuʔ na s~ɕzjon mwaħ mani okjak ,ana ɣa knalaj nħa nniqun nja ħekil ru qwaw trakis~ɕ ru tqenuw tnaħuk nħa aliʔrima ki ajanq ɣa s~ɕʔutux nħa βalj maniq , s~ɕpijaŋ na s~ɕmjaʔ mwaħ mβazij lpjuŋ ħoɣan la. tuqij **** mzjup ta qalaŋ ulaj ru ħnas~ɕun ta tuqi us~ɕa mpiraj ħlaħuj ru s~ɕi lɣluw mus~ɕa qalaŋ raħaw mrkjas~ɕ qmzit turuj mus~ɕa ru βaqaw ta ** kore ħazi s~ɕtwaħiq lɣa pteħuk qalaŋ mtranana la. waħan tβas~ɕaw mzwi **** te qutux: kojeŋ kperaj,maki s~ɕqi jatux na ɣoŋ mtranan ʦ~ʨiŋaj ppħpaħ s~ɕjaw tuqi ru mtas~ɕaw qs~ɕjaʔ ɣoŋ, teħuk rjax ʔβaɣan lɣa ,kħmaj βe okjak mwaħ nʔos~ɕ tmŋa, lmos~ɕaj s~ɕqani. te s~ɕaziŋ: ħkŋjan tuqi us~ɕa qalaŋ ɣiran lompja ru us~ɕa tojiŋ, qalaŋ na βaluŋ,mtmalam lħβaw qs~ɕilq na mkal tuqi ħkŋjan ,tuqi na pʔaɣan s~ɕquliq s~ɕraral. te ʦ~ʨjuɣan:s~ɕka na tliŋaj qalaŋ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux pira i mniqan ru waħan mħŋaw mʔaβiʔħŋawan,ru ps~ɕluj pβiran qqajaʔħlaħuj. te mpajat:jatux na qalaŋ ʦ~ʨjux kja maʦ~ʨjapaw ki s~ɕjawme pqniqan ru pʔβjal waħan mħŋaw lmos~ɕaj,maki βalaj lħβaw mħħwaħ us~ɕuw qs~ɕliq inluŋan s~ɕquliq ki! == ***** ==
S.FORM: == cyux te inu qu qalang 部落概況與位置 == qalang na tranan ga,kki'an na squliq Tayal,smsun squ gaga ru pincbaqan na qnxan Tayal,ini iyal wahiy pcyaqih na pmrruw zyuwaw kbalyun ,nanu qu rhizyal qyunam,inkyasan hlahuy ga mtasaw kinbalay betunux ,giwal nqu qqalang betunux minnanak iyat hmtan pkton na rhzyal.yasa qu tepucig min'zyu be thaqan na qalanq,maki sa yatux balau qu dong mstranan,maki hazi 106.3188 mpayat hkuy kore kinslabang nya ru 600 meta kinwag. sinllwan lalu qalang 地名由來 Pinqzwan nqu mrhuw ta Yawi.Puna' ga,kahl kinhulan lkotas ta pinsbkan, ru magan squ kinqoyat biniq na Lkbuta lru rasun nya kwara cingasal nya si pkrayas squ hlahuy ,mintehuk squ qalang mstranan qani ,qsu'un nya psurux qalang beh gong cyaqung qasa, yasa qu qsu balay maki qalang beh yatux na llyung mstranan la,,baqaw ta kawas 1730 hazi mwah min'izyu sqani.suruw ryax nasa ga, ktan nha talagay pizyux qqulih Tayal si qopu' mutu' babaw na qsya llyung ru cingay bal qsinuw nyux mhmut mlata' mqyanux beh syaw gong ru rrgyax,pqasun balay inlungan nya mrhu Yawi.Puna' ini naga kzinga nya musa kmayal mrhu krahu kinholan nqu Lkbuta,pqutan nya Yawi.Puna' qenu qasa ? nanu lalu na? si knguray mnglung kma qu Yawi.Puna' mha: trang ryax nasa ga …..trang …ini nya baqi lalu nya ,iyat nya pnongan ana qutux uzi, nanu yasa si piray hmali nya mrhu Lkbuta' mha: mstranan ,twangan nya an suruw trang lga lalu na Tayal" tranan " mha la,ana musa qalang inu qalang Tayal ga ,pqzyu' squ qalang mtranan ga misuw bal llungun nha rhzyal na hbuyaw qquliq Tayal ru qsinuw nhyun nqu mblaq qqoyat na qalang ,mwah squ tlelu mlahang lga "xusan song"son nha la, ana betaq soni qu lalu na qalang la. pinqzyuwan qalang 部落遷徙 qalang mstranan ga n_gyut hbuyaw squliq mqyanux lga,musa mgayangpsgagay hkangi giqas na qyunam,cyugan kbhul kawas wayal ga kahul sa qalang na Takasan Toyengmkrayas bbu' na lupi mbziq mhkangi kakay tehuk sqaniru kbalay qalanq kki'an,ini bsyaq qu phbuyaw squliq na qalang ru rasun nya pqasuw llaqi na musa pkbalay nanaq qu qqalang kki'an nhamaki zmagan qu llaqi nya Yawi.Puna' mtasaw balay inlungan nharu smsun balay kinbaqan nqu lkotas kwara nha.tun nya llaqi si lgluwllyung mstrnana mbziq musa hkzngi 'san nha qalalang nanaq,yasaqu qsuyan laqi maray ga sbilun qalang kwara cingasal nya,te sazinglaqi Tana gaptqalang beh Rahaw;te cyugan laqi Iban ga pyqalang squ Ulay;te mpayat laqi ga mus ptqalang kraga;te zmzgan laqi ga ptqalang nqu Kayu'(Tampya),squliq na Tayal qani ga,si tryax mgluw llyung mstranan mbziq musa mlata tqulih ru qmalup,netaq qu gong talah ru mbiq squ llyung mintehuh rhzyal na bnka' ru bsilung na benux lupi'mblaq balay mqyanux s\\qsahuy na qyunam bniq ni lkotas,kyopan ta na kmukan minkahul cinbwanan na thelulga ,si ta ryax mciraq pqqun rhzyal qnxun,ana gipun mwah klahng ita Taywan na ga sir u pciriq pkkyut krryax,nanu I kblayun nya qiway qqhoniq qu qes na Tayal ki kmukan lru yasa ini pciruq pkkut la,maki b'nux naqnahan Tayal qu ksu' (Pyasan.Maray)qu tayal,nanu I syan nha muci Tayal na ubuy Ksyu' lpi. tayal ka nyux qalang Piyaway misuw qaniy 人口概況 Ryax nasa ga musa hazi maki kbhul zmiman squliq na kya,baha hmswa maki qwang iyal nqu qalang sa ru ini nbah phtuw qalang,si muku mqumah ru mlata hlahuy qnxan nha kwara squliq qalang,baqaw ta aring kawas minkoku 70 ga,qalanq kyahu ga,t'aring prmuruw zyuwaw na lmosay hlahuy,phluzyun nha cingay be squliq hogan mwah qalang rgyax,gyahan nha blihul qalang mwah mkal ru mangay mblaq na ktal betunux na qqsya' ki hlahuy la,squliq na kmkukan lga cingay uzi mwah pbaziy ru 'myuw qeqaya' na Tayal,kruma kmukan lga n_gyut mwah tmwang maki sqani uzi la. snhyan 部落宗教 Kirsto Kyokay ru Tensukyo qqyanux 經濟與特產 qalang Tranan ga maki nyux msyobay na wahan gmzuy tbasaw na okyak;wahan maniq blaq na nniqun hlahuy wahan mhngaw m'abi, ru wahan mqbaq gaga tayal ka cinringan mze'a nqu lubuw tminun cinrngan.mqumah na rramat nniqun lpyung hogan, pbaziy pinbahu hiya ga ungat iyu' na szyon mwah mani okyak ,ana ga knalay nha nniqun nya hekil ru qwaw trakis ru tqenuw tnahuk nha ali'rima ki ayanq ga s'utux nha baly maniq , spiyang na smya' mwah mbaziy lpyung hogan la. tuqiy 部落交通 mzyup ta qalang Ulay ru hnasun ta tuqi usa mpiray hlahuy ru si lgluw musa qalang Rahaw mrkyas qmzit turuy musa ru baqaw ta 12 kore hazi stwahiq lga ptehuk qalang mtranana la. wahan tbasaw mzwi 部落觀光 Te qutux: koyeng kperay,maki sqi yatux na gong mtranan cingay pphpah syaw tuqi ru mtasaw qsya' gong, tehuk ryax 'bagan lga ,khmay be okyak mwah n'os tmnga, lmosay sqani. Te sazing: hkngyan tuqi usa qalang giran Lompya ru usa toying, qalang na balung,mtmalam lhbaw qsilq na mkal tuqi hkngyan ,tuqi na p'agan squliq sraral. Te cyugan:ska na tlingay qalang ga cyux pira i mniqan ru wahan mhngaw m'abi'hngawan,ru psluy pbiran qqaya'hlahuy. Te mpayat:yatux na qalang cyux kya macyapaw ki syawme pqniqan ru p'byal wahan mhngaw lmosay,maki balay lhbaw mhhwah usuw qsliq inlungan squliq ki! == 部落文健站 ==
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨjux te inu qu qalaŋ ******* == qalaŋ na tranan ɣa,kkiʔan na s~ɕquliq tajal,s~ɕms~ɕun s~ɕqu ɣaɣa ru pinʦ~ʨβaqan na qnxan tajal,ini ijal waħij pʦ~ʨjaqiħ na pmrruw zjuwaw kβaljun ,nanu qu rħizjal qjunam,inkjas~ɕan ħlaħuj ɣa mtas~ɕaw kinβalaj βetunux ,ɣiwal nqu qqalaŋ βetunux minnanak ijat ħmtan pkton na rħzjal.jas~ɕa qu tepuʦ~ʨiɣ minʔzju βe tħaqan na qalanq,maki s~ɕa jatux βalau qu *oŋ ms~ɕtranan,maki ħazi ***.**** mpajat ħkuj kore kins~ɕlaβaŋ nja ru *** meta kinwaɣ. s~ɕinllwan lalu qalaŋ **** pinqzwan nqu mrħuw ta jawi.punaʔ ɣa,kaħl kinħulan lkotas~ɕ ta pins~ɕβkan, ru maɣan s~ɕqu kinqojat βiniq na lkβuta lru ras~ɕun nja kwara ʦ~ʨiŋas~ɕal nja s~ɕi pkrajas~ɕ s~ɕqu ħlaħuj ,minteħuk s~ɕqu qalaŋ ms~ɕtranan qani ,qs~ɕuʔun nja ps~ɕurux qalaŋ βeħ ɣoŋ ʦ~ʨjaquŋ qas~ɕa, jas~ɕa qu qs~ɕu βalaj maki qalaŋ βeħ jatux na lljuŋ ms~ɕtranan la,,βaqaw ta kawas~ɕ **** ħazi mwaħ minʔizju s~ɕqani.s~ɕuruw rjax nas~ɕa ɣa, ktan nħa talaɣaj pizjux qquliħ tajal s~ɕi qopuʔ mutuʔ βaβaw na qs~ɕja lljuŋ ru ʦ~ʨiŋaj βal qs~ɕinuw njux mħmut mlataʔ mqjanux βeħ s~ɕjaw ɣoŋ ru rrɣjax,pqas~ɕun βalaj inluŋan nja mrħu jawi.punaʔ ini naɣa kziŋa nja mus~ɕa kmajal mrħu kraħu kinħolan nqu lkβuta,pqutan nja jawi.punaʔ qenu qas~ɕa ? nanu lalu na? s~ɕi kŋuraj mŋluŋ kma qu jawi.punaʔ mħa: traŋ rjax nas~ɕa ɣa *..traŋ *ini nja βaqi lalu nja ,ijat nja pnoŋan ana qutux uzi, nanu jas~ɕa s~ɕi piraj ħmali nja mrħu lkβutaʔ mħa: ms~ɕtranan ,twaŋan nja an s~ɕuruw traŋ lɣa lalu na tajal" tranan " mħa la,ana mus~ɕa qalaŋ inu qalaŋ tajal ɣa ,pqzjuʔ s~ɕqu qalaŋ mtranan ɣa mis~ɕuw βal lluŋun nħa rħzjal na ħβujaw qquliq tajal ru qs~ɕinuw nħjun nqu mβlaq qqojat na qalaŋ ,mwaħ s~ɕqu tlelu mlaħaŋ lɣa "xus~ɕan s~ɕoŋ"s~ɕon nħa la, ana βetaq s~ɕoni qu lalu na qalaŋ la. pinqzjuwan qalaŋ **** qalaŋ ms~ɕtranan ɣa nɣjut ħβujaw s~ɕquliq mqjanux lɣa,mus~ɕa mɣajaŋps~ɕɣaɣaj ħkaŋi ɣiqas~ɕ na qjunam,ʦ~ʨjuɣan kβħul kawas~ɕ wajal ɣa kaħul s~ɕa qalaŋ na takas~ɕan tojeŋmkrajas~ɕ ββuʔ na lupi mβziq mħkaŋi kakaj teħuk s~ɕqaniru kβalaj qalanq kkiʔan,ini βs~ɕjaq qu pħβujaw s~ɕquliq na qalaŋ ru ras~ɕun nja pqas~ɕuw llaqi na mus~ɕa pkβalaj nanaq qu qqalaŋ kkiʔan nħamaki zmaɣan qu llaqi nja jawi.punaʔ mtas~ɕaw βalaj inluŋan nħaru s~ɕms~ɕun βalaj kinβaqan nqu lkotas~ɕ kwara nħa.tun nja llaqi s~ɕi lɣluwlljuŋ ms~ɕtrnana mβziq mus~ɕa ħkzŋi ʔs~ɕan nħa qalalaŋ nanaq,jas~ɕaqu qs~ɕujan laqi maraj ɣa s~ɕβilun qalaŋ kwara ʦ~ʨiŋas~ɕal nja,te s~ɕaziŋlaqi tana ɣaptqalaŋ βeħ raħaw;te ʦ~ʨjuɣan laqi iβan ɣa pjqalaŋ s~ɕqu ulaj;te mpajat laqi ɣa mus~ɕ ptqalaŋ kraɣa;te zmzɣan laqi ɣa ptqalaŋ nqu kajuʔ(tampja),s~ɕquliq na tajal qani ɣa,s~ɕi trjax mɣluw lljuŋ ms~ɕtranan mβziq mus~ɕa mlata tquliħ ru qmalup,netaq qu ɣoŋ talaħ ru mβiq s~ɕqu lljuŋ minteħuħ rħzjal na βnkaʔ ru βs~ɕiluŋ na βenux lupiʔmβlaq βalaj mqjanux s~ɕ\\qs~ɕaħuj na qjunam βniq ni lkotas~ɕ,kjopan ta na kmukan minkaħul ʦ~ʨinβwanan na tħelulɣa ,s~ɕi ta rjax mʦ~ʨiraq pqqun rħzjal qnxun,ana ɣipun mwaħ klaħŋ ita tajwan na ɣa s~ɕir u pʦ~ʨiriq pkkjut krrjax,nanu i kβlajun nja qiwaj qqħoniq qu qes~ɕ na tajal ki kmukan lru jas~ɕa ini pʦ~ʨiruq pkkut la,maki βʔnux naqnaħan tajal qu ks~ɕuʔ (pjas~ɕan.maraj)qu tajal,nanu i s~ɕjan nħa muʦ~ʨi tajal na uβuj ks~ɕjuʔ lpi. tajal ka njux qalaŋ pijawaj mis~ɕuw qanij **** rjax nas~ɕa ɣa mus~ɕa ħazi maki kβħul zmiman s~ɕquliq na kja,βaħa ħms~ɕwa maki qwaŋ ijal nqu qalaŋ s~ɕa ru ini nβaħ pħtuw qalaŋ,s~ɕi muku mqumaħ ru mlata ħlaħuj qnxan nħa kwara s~ɕquliq qalaŋ,βaqaw ta ariŋ kawas~ɕ minkoku ** ɣa,qalanq kjaħu ɣa,tʔariŋ prmuruw zjuwaw na lmos~ɕaj ħlaħuj,pħluzjun nħa ʦ~ʨiŋaj βe s~ɕquliq ħoɣan mwaħ qalaŋ rɣjax,ɣjaħan nħa βliħul qalaŋ mwaħ mkal ru maŋaj mβlaq na ktal βetunux na qqs~ɕjaʔ ki ħlaħuj la,s~ɕquliq na kmkukan lɣa ʦ~ʨiŋaj uzi mwaħ pβazij ru ʔmjuw qeqajaʔ na tajal,kruma kmukan lɣa nɣjut mwaħ tmwaŋ maki s~ɕqani uzi la. s~ɕnħjan **** kirs~ɕto kjokaj ru tens~ɕukjo qqjanux ***** qalaŋ tranan ɣa maki njux ms~ɕjoβaj na waħan ɣmzuj tβas~ɕaw na okjak;waħan maniq βlaq na nniqun ħlaħuj waħan mħŋaw mʔaβi, ru waħan mqβaq ɣaɣa tajal ka ʦ~ʨinriŋan mzeʔa nqu luβuw tminun ʦ~ʨinrŋan.mqumaħ na rramat nniqun lpjuŋ ħoɣan, pβazij pinβaħu ħija ɣa uŋat ijuʔ na s~ɕzjon mwaħ mani okjak ,ana ɣa knalaj nħa nniqun nja ħekil ru qwaw trakis~ɕ ru tqenuw tnaħuk nħa aliʔrima ki ajanq ɣa s~ɕʔutux nħa βalj maniq , s~ɕpijaŋ na s~ɕmjaʔ mwaħ mβazij lpjuŋ ħoɣan la. tuqij **** mzjup ta qalaŋ ulaj ru ħnas~ɕun ta tuqi us~ɕa mpiraj ħlaħuj ru s~ɕi lɣluw mus~ɕa qalaŋ raħaw mrkjas~ɕ qmzit turuj mus~ɕa ru βaqaw ta ** kore ħazi s~ɕtwaħiq lɣa pteħuk qalaŋ mtranana la. waħan tβas~ɕaw mzwi **** te qutux: kojeŋ kperaj,maki s~ɕqi jatux na ɣoŋ mtranan ʦ~ʨiŋaj ppħpaħ s~ɕjaw tuqi ru mtas~ɕaw qs~ɕjaʔ ɣoŋ, teħuk rjax ʔβaɣan lɣa ,kħmaj βe okjak mwaħ nʔos~ɕ tmŋa, lmos~ɕaj s~ɕqani. te s~ɕaziŋ: ħkŋjan tuqi us~ɕa qalaŋ ɣiran lompja ru us~ɕa tojiŋ, qalaŋ na βaluŋ,mtmalam lħβaw qs~ɕilq na mkal tuqi ħkŋjan ,tuqi na pʔaɣan s~ɕquliq s~ɕraral. te ʦ~ʨjuɣan:s~ɕka na tliŋaj qalaŋ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux pira i mniqan ru waħan mħŋaw mʔaβiʔħŋawan,ru ps~ɕluj pβiran qqajaʔħlaħuj. te mpajat:jatux na qalaŋ ʦ~ʨjux kja maʦ~ʨjapaw ki s~ɕjawme pqniqan ru pʔβjal waħan mħŋaw lmos~ɕaj,maki βalaj lħβaw mħħwaħ us~ɕuw qs~ɕliq inluŋan s~ɕquliq ki! == ***** ==
